body:
Deploy a stripped .env to the VM with ONLY read-only database credentials. This enables portal pages (student, showcase, college, wji) to show real data without any LLM cost risk.

Safe vars to include:
- PG_HOST, PG_DATABASE, PG_USER (cfa_readonly), PG_PORT, PG_PASSWORD
- BLOB_CONNECTION_STRING (read existing resumes/images)

Vars to EXCLUDE:
- GEMINI_API_KEY, AZURE_OPENAI_KEY (LLM cost risk)
- GRAPH_CLIENT_SECRET (can send emails as ritu@computingforall.org)
- APOLLO_API_KEY (can modify CRM contacts)
- AZURE_CLIENT_SECRET (can write to Dynamics CRM)
- SCOPING_WEBHOOK_URL (can trigger Power Automate flows)

Requires: standing up read-only portal APIs (student, showcase, college, wji). Blocked by API gateway consolidation or can deploy individual read-only services as stopgap.
title: feat: deploy read-only database connection for portal data
